345095.魂の盃から出ていた 煙のようなものは\n跡形もなく 消えている。:
The smoke-like substance that had been rising
from the Chalice of Souls is no more.

345824.<center> \n『カラマドの剣 ３か条』\n<br>\n \nひとつ ヒト:
The Three Precepts of the Sword of Calamad
Never kill another person.
Lend an ear to even the most trivial of matters.
The squad must work in unison to become a single bladeーand the Captain must be the swordsman who wields this blade.

347196.板が 打ちつけられており\nこの先には 進めそうにない。:
The path has been boarded over.
There's no getting through here.

347197.<center> \nこの先 修復中のため 立ち入り禁止。: No entry permitted due to repairs.

350421.巨大な糸車が 休むことなく\n回転し続けている。:
A massive spinning wheel turns without
end.

350552.扉は 閉ざされている。\nこちら側からは 開くことが できないようだ。\n<br:
The door is shut and can't be opened from
this side. Try finding another way in.

350553.扉は 閉ざされている。\n今は 開くことが できないようだ。\n<br>\n他の:
The door is closed tight. It doesn't appear it can be opened at the moment.
Try looking elsewhere.

350731.『ふっかつのたま』という 商品がある。\n<br>\n冒険の記録が どこでもでき:
It's a product called a "Revival Orb". Apparently, it allows you to record your adventures no matter where you are.
How is that different than an Adventure Log, though...?

350732.『しあわせのくつ』という 商品がある。\n<br>\nはいていると 経験値が多く:
It's a product called the "Elevating Shoes".
Apparently, wearing them helps you to earn lots of experience points when walking around.
But the soles are completely worn down, so they probably won't do anything special...

350733.『はぐれのさとり』という 商品がある。\n<br>\n貴重な職業に 転職できる書:
It's a product called "Liquid Metal Mind".
It appears to be a tome that allows you to change into a very rare vocation.
Looking inside, though...it's completely empty!

352538.<center>小劇場では 魅力的なショーを\n定期的に 開催しています！\nぜ:
Our Little Theatre hosts captivating shows on
the regular! We invite you to come and enjoy
the marvelous sights for yourself!

352539.<center>サメ男が 小劇場に襲来！？\n歴史に残る 貴重な瞬間を 見逃すな:
Is it a man?! Is it a shark?! And it's
attacking our Little Theatre?! Don't miss
this unforgettably historic moment!

352868.石でできた墓が 並んでいる。\n亡くなった村人たちが 眠っているらしい。\n墓石:
Stone graves stand here in a row. The villagers who had passed away have been laid to rest here.
Words are carved into the stone...
"Here lie the people of Agura. We pray that their souls be guided to a place free of hunger and suffering."

353428.返事がない。\nただの しかばねのようだ……。:
There's no response.
It's just a corpse.

353429.返事がない。\nただの しかばねのようだ……。:
There's no response.
It's just a corpse.

353944.使い込まれた 訓練用の人形がある。\n何者かが ここで 激しい訓練をしていたよう:
It's a pretty worn out training dummy.
It must have been used in some intense
training.
